__fixture_tag__: SAMPLE FIXTURE — not real data, for selftest replay only
__source__: Catalysis-Hub.org record schema (illustrative); real fetch via GraphQL API at https://api.catalysis-hub.org/graphql (Reactions / Publications / Systems endpoints)
__honest_note__: Catalysis-Hub (NTNU + Stanford SUNCAT, Winther et al. 2019 Sci. Data 6, 75) is a DFT-prediction database of surface reactions + adsorption energies. > 100,000 reactions, computed with GPAW + VASP. ALL records are PREDICTIONS — distinct from COD / NIMS-experimental records. Reaction-energy MAE vs experiment varies by xc-functional (BEEF-vdW typical ~0.1-0.2 eV; PBE looser).
prediction_method: DFT BEEF-vdW (GPAW); transition-state via climbing-image NEB
is_synthesized: N/A (computational adsorption-energy database; surface model only)

publication.primary: Winther, K. T., Hoffmann, M. J., Boes, J. R., Mamun, O., Bajdich, M., Bligaard, T. 'Catalysis-Hub.org, an open electronic structure database for surface reactions.' Sci. Data 6, 75 (2019)
publication.secondary: Schlexer Lamoureux, P., Winther, K. T., Garrido Torres, J. A., Streibel, V., Zhao, M., Bajdich, M., Abild-Pedersen, F., Bligaard, T. 'Machine Learning for Computational Heterogeneous Catalysis.' ChemCatChem 11, 3833 (2019)

license: CC-BY 4.0 (Catalysis-Hub data policy; citation required to Winther 2019 + Schlexer Lamoureux 2019)
verdict: PREDICTION (DFT surface-reaction, BEEF-vdW + GPAW), not measurement
